reviews.response:
Dear Vlastimil,
Thank you for choosing TTC Hotel – Phan Thiet for your stay in Phan Thiet and for sharing your comments. We truly value the opinions of our customers.
I am sorry when you said that there was an insect in your room. As you know, once a week, we coordinate with The Pest Control company to clean guest rooms and public areas in our hotel. However, in the summer, insects frequently appear so we will request the Pest Control company to enhance the efficiency of insect destruction.
We always welcome all feedback which allows us to continually improve our services and standards in the hotel, and once again, I would like to thank you and sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. I hope to have the opportunity of welcoming you back when next you visit TTC Hotel Premium Phan Thiet.
With our best regards,
Director 
Dinh Thi Thanh Xuan

reviews.title: Help me write a review for a hotel, acting as a fair and objective customer - The only good about this hotel is locate right in front of the beach - I booked the sea view room, but the window is seal,
reviews.text:
This hotel boasts a prime location right on the beach, which is its only real positive. Unfortunately, my experience went downhill from there. Despite booking a sea view room, the window was sealed shut. This completely defeated the purpose of paying extra for the view, as I could not enjoy the sounds or fresh air of the ocean.

The lobby seemed decent, but the room itself was extremely dated. The bathroom was particularly disappointing, with old, outdated fixtures and noticeable stains. For the price I paid (even with a discount), I'm confident I could have found much better accommodations elsewhere.

Recommendation: If a beachfront view is your absolute top priority, you might consider this hotel. However, be prepared for a very basic and potentially disappointing room experience. I'd advise exploring other options in the area before booking.

reviews.title: Worst 4 stars facility ever!!
reviews.text: We booked for a king ocean view room with access to window, but when we checked in, the room was moldy, window was sealed and can not be opened!!!dated furnitures and you can see water marks and molds along the ceilings and walls!! The hallway smelt moldy and dirty.  It seems like the AC can not be adjusted as it gets really hot during the night.  Overpriced as we booked during the vietnamese holiday!! We got sick from sleeping in the moldy room with no access to fresh air as the window was sealed!!! They should have update their info to let the guests know that the windows are sealed and can not be opened before booking!!! Very deceiving!!!
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/ Madam 
Thank you for choosing TTC Hotel Phan Thiet for your vacation.

Looking forward to welcoming you again soon.
Thanks & Best regards,
Dinh Thi Thanh Xuan
General Manager.

reviews.title: Terrible! Definitely not 4 star standard!
reviews.text:
Hair was all over the toilet bowl. Dirty & used towels still hung behind the door when we came in. 
Some weirdly tasted sugarcane water bottles provided for free, but not water. Be careful of non/complimentary drinks in the room. My fam member accidentally took a normal water bottle and was extra charged. 
They claimed swimming pool to be open till 10pm but you will find it close at 6pm or happy hour 5pm-8pm but there is no such thing! When asked, the staff said they needed to reprint all the ads which were wrong (?!) The thing is we customers paid for that/never were informed of such thing before we arrived! 
The breakfast buffet is a horror. The man serving at the noodle bar kept telling us to go other stalls due to "no more!" But a minute later you'll see more food coming.. Service is real bad. The dining place is a mess with almost >500 people and super noisy. No grace. Do not have any (high) expectation! 
The gym is another nightmare-the room is filled with painting smell etc

reviews.title: Very poor performance and facilities not qualify 4 Star
reviews.text:
we have spent 2 nights in our Nation Aniversary holiday dated 3 &4 September.
1, Staff: no welcome drink and staff not help to carry laggues then we have to bring by our selves to check in.
Second, when we joined breakfast buffet have no tables but staff not clear  for us then we have do it ourselves.
2, Facilities: Corridor not turn on light and dark ,no AC .in fact , it might not issue.
Rooms is terrible sound insulation, when we stayed inside the room we heard every noise outside corridor and can not sleep well.What kind of 4 star like this? 
Pool is small, super crowded.
Seafood buffet at 3rd sep night is also super poor quality with phew seafood and some vegetable .
Breakfast is poor , i just ate opplet with bread only both days.
we booked seafood buffet ticket since very early at noon same day but staff not prepare our table .what the hell with their services???
 In conclusion, I was suprised with positive review for this hotel. This should not let 4 star at main gate

reviews.title: Hotel Facilities are ok, but poor services
reviews.text:
The hotel is reasonable price, most of the staff are friendly. There are many areas needed to be improved. The hotel just has been ranked at 4 stars, but it is real 3 stars instead. The staff are not professionals. When I came three was only 01 receptionists and let us to wait long for checking in. The staff at the restaurant are terrible and did not know how to manage over crowded guests. We feeled so disappointed that we book 02 rooms with 04 kids and free for morning buffet (all are under 6 years of age), when we came down for breakfast and could not find a table so I and my wife got out with 03 kids (one is my nephew) and ask to come Back when there were some seats were available but the gate keeper (her name is Vy) did not permit and ask for payment for an additional kid. We tried to explained that we could not find a table and will return when seats were are available. How we could have breakfast without table? More disappointed that the manager (later found she served at noodles area) suddenly came and asked for payment without knowing what was happening. Door guard and bellboy are very helpful.

There were not many choice for meals and entertainment close by hotel. We just relaxed at swimming pool, could not swim at sea

Much better to go to Mui Ne resort, where you can book a better resort with less expense.

reviews.negatives: I didn't like I couldn't swim in the ocean, waves were too high, but the swimming pool made up for the lack of opportunity to swim in the ocean. It would be nice if there would be bar to buy some drinks and place to seat outside, the best would be roof top bar with amazing view.

reviews.title: A Hotel that has lost Standard and dignity
reviews.text:
Checkin and Counter was working fine. Parking as well good.
During the evening after sunset when I attended to the Swimming Pool, a lots of chaos around the pool and a small boy age 8 or thereabout had swallowed lots of water from the Adult Pool. Firstly, the boy had been in the small pool (low water depth), then he tried the deep part of the second pool and failed to be able to reach from one side of the pool to the opposite side, hence lost conscious and was close drowning.

Secondly, there was nobody from the Hotel staff around. There was no one at the Hotel being able to perform First Aid / CPR. Local persons turned the boys head down to get the water out of him and laid him on a Sun-bed with mouth up, while tapping his head and shouting loudly that he should responde to their questions.

Luckily, there was a local young female who asked me whether being able to give CPR, which I could agree upon.
After a quick check on the Boys Color, his Pulse, His pupils, his breath and reaction in general, I gave some Hearth Massage to be sure the AirWays were all clear for water. Puls was far above 200 per minute. I turned the boy in "Nato Position", meaning on his right side and arms as per regular instructions.

Checking his pulse, temperature, consciously aware, Pupils, Eyes reaction, and the most important, to get the crowd of jelling people away or to be quiet. After some 10-15 minutes where the Boy was periodically crying (most because he got scared by the loud crowd), he recovered and pulse stabilized to around 100-120 per minute.

Meanwhile, the boy have been very close to pass away and had made in his swimming pants, which he realized when recovering and smelled himself and being uncomfortable that anyone should carry him indoor.

reviews.title: Needs improvement with staff and communication.
reviews.text:
The location of this hotel is not in a very good location. You will need to take a taxi to get anywhere in the town. 

We really struggled with the staff and communicating with them. 

We tried to order drinks at the pool, and that was very complicated for such a simple task. They showed us a menu, we pointed at what we would like and they would just say "no" to the drink, and had no reason to why. We asked when those beverages would be available, and they couldn't answer. After my partner went up and asked again, he was told the same thing. He asked to talk to someone else, and they eventually that person let us order the drink. The drink (a screwdriver) took forever to receive, and smallest overpriced drink we have had in Vietnam. Then paying for the drink became super confusing. It pretty much ruined our peaceful time at the pool. 

The pool is nice, however the pool boy is awkward and hovers around making you feel like he wants to close the pool down. 

We are vegetarian, like many other people in this country.
 This hotel did not understand the concept at all. Everytime we ordered food it became a huge ordeal, and we would end up having to leave the restaurant, go to the front desk and then order from there. This happened for every meal we ordered for our two night stay. It made us feel embarrassed and awkward. This is the first time we have had issues with being vegetarian in Vietnam and we have been traveling this country for two months. 
We even had issues ordering just water. We understand that english is not the first language here, but even had a difficult time with Google  translate, and employees who clamied they understood English. 
We tried to order room service once, and that was even difficult. We would give them name of the vegetarian item in the menu and the out of nowhere they would say, okay and you want beef added? After them not understanding I had to go down to the front desk and order the room service. 

The breakfast was poor and lacked in

How can this be in a 4/5* hotel. Finally he asked the desk manager to come out and again i asked the questions. Explained wanted to arrange to bus to Nah Trang in 2 days. HE said could arrange it for $2,200,000 dong or $130 canadian. Seemed crazy price but I agreed out of frustration. Maybe communication was part my fault but again " bus to Nah Trang" not a big ask. Ended up the manager had arranged a private car for the 4 hour trip. THere must have been busses for about $10 per person but the front desk and manager were not helpful to arrange that at all!

reviews.positives: Các bạn tiếp tân rất thân thiện nhiệt tình
reviews.negatives:
Tôi thấy đôi điều còn bất cập:
Thứ nhất: Khi đặt booking, thông tin là giường super king cho 4 người (2 người lớn và 2 trẻ em), nhưng khi nhận chỉ là giường đôi bình thường, vật dụng sinh hoạt cũng chỉ đủ cho 2 người. (trong khi lúc đặt là cho 4 người kể cả dịch vụ điểm tâm sáng)
Thứ hai: về nhà hàng điểm tâm, cần chú ý về cách phục vụ của các bạn, cách vệ sinh bàn và vật dụng trên bàn ăn, tôi cảm giác không vệ sinh khi dùng chung thảm ăn của người ăn trước (thức ăn thừa vẫn còn bám lại trên thảm ấy). Thay vì các bạn phục vụ lau bàn và  gom thức ăn rơi vãi trên bàn lại thì các bạn lại lau và cho thẳng xuống sàn nhà hàng, rồi có bạn khác lấy chổi quét rác dưới nền nhà hàng trong khi khách vẫn đang dùng bữa tại nhà hàng.
Thứ ba: phục vụ phòng cũng chưa chuyên nghiệp, Ngày đầu nhận phòng, đề nghị cung cấp thêm mền gối thì phải đến khi nhắc lần thứ ba mới nhận được (lúc này là đã hơn 9pm). Ngày thứ hai, khi dọn phòng vẫn không thay ga giường mới và hiện trạng giường ban đầu như thế nào để y như thế ấy, chỉ thay mỗi nước uống, khăn tắm, thiếu thảm dậm chân cũng không cung cấp mới (lấy cái cũ đi, nhưng không thay cái mới)

reviews.title: Hotel located across the street from nice beach area
reviews.text: The hotel is located directly across the street from a nice beach area. The staff is very helpful & friendly but that hotel is a bit dated in need of some maintenance or upgrading. The rooms are nice & comfortable except that the air conditioning doesn’t cool as well as I would expect. The included breakfast buffet is large & has a good selection so no one would leave hungry in the mornings. Restaurants & attractions are located in the general area but most people would prefer to take a taxi since since they are all a lengthy walk from the hotel. The TTC BBQ restaurant next to the hotel offers a delicious “all you can eat & drink” dinner special which is excellent. Overall, the hotel is a good value for the money if booked at discounted rates on Agoda. In my opinion, regular room rates are too high until the hotel is updated. We stayed in a Superior Room for $33.00 per night which I feel is a fair price with all things considered & this was my 2nd stay at the hotel.
reviews.response: Thank you for your comment  and hope you will be back at our hotel on next trip.  Sincerely !

reviews.title: TTC is also fine.
reviews.text:
Our family has stayed at TTC quite a few times, the location is in the center of Phan Thiet city, making it convenient to move around the central area. 
- The facilities at TTC have been improved a bit compared to before.
- Breakfast is average.
- The rooms are spacious, but the facilities are not modern.
- The beach is accessible by crossing the road, but it's sometimes a bit lazy if there are many young children.
- The parking area is spacious and comfortable.
- The price is reasonable, suitable for business meetings and an overnight stop.
If I stay for just one night, I would still choose TTC for its convenient location and reasonable price.

reviews.title: Nice big hotel
reviews.text:
This hotel is nice though has no character - it could have been anywhere in the world, and you would not be able to tell. I would not give it 4 stars but also have nothing to complain about. Except maybe breakfast. Though it was a large buffet, it was not mostly local Asian food and not very tasty. However, we got a room with no breakfast, but the hotel staff still gave us vouchers for it every day!
Otherwise we liked it. Pool area is very nice. Beach is nearby (though we could not swim because of the surf), staff is helpful.
We had a deluxe room with large bed and shower/tub. Description claimed that it had a whirlpool, but it was just a regular bath tub.
We enjoyed live piano music in the lounge in the evening.
Overall experience is very positive.
reviews.positives: big clean room, nice bed, beautiful pool area

reviews.title: Friendly staff, large rooms and centrally located
reviews.text:
Before being pleasantly greeted at the counter I had a unfriendly meeting with people in the basement.  They did not smile or spoke a word.  I asked for the restroom but they gave a broad location where I did not find it.  I held it until I got inside.  After that everything was nice.  The staff was very cordial.  

I want to comment on the room condition.  It was very nice, but for a four-star hotel to miss many drywall tape and texture the wall is kind of inexcusable.  Inside many of the soffits were untaped joints with screws showing.
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, large room but not detailed, and city center

reviews.title: The room has a sea view, but the glass door is cloudy and dirty, limiting the view. The hotel has poor soundproofing, so young children are not allowed to run around making noise; families with small children should avoid staying here.
reviews.text: The room is clean, the bed is spacious, and the staff is friendly; however, it is quite old. The bathroom has no place to hang things because it's broken, causing inconvenience. The hotel is quite far from the beach; to reach a sandy beach, one has to walk about 300 meters. The beach near Doi Duong Park is not suitable for small children and the elderly because there is no long stretch of sand. Doi Duong beach has shells and large sand, which can be quite painful for the feet when swimming. If you're traveling to Phan Thiet for a food tour, this is a good location, convenient for moving around.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Mrs Hanh,

TTC Hotel Premium Phan Thiết chân thành cảm ơn Quý Khách đã lựa chọn lưu trú và dành thời gian chia sẻ những nhận xét chi tiết sau chuyến đi.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý Khách hài lòng về sự sạch sẽ của phòng, giường ngủ rộng rãi cũng như sự thân thiện của đội ngũ nhân viên. Đây là nguồn động viên rất lớn để chúng tôi tiếp tục duy trì và nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ.

Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi cũng xin ghi nhận những góp ý của Quý Khách liên quan đến tình trạng cửa kính, vấn đề cách âm, cũng như tiện nghi trong phòng tắm. Khách sạn đã chuyển thông tin đến bộ phận liên quan để kiểm tra và khắc phục nhằm mang lại trải nghiệm tốt hơn cho các lần lưu trú tiếp theo.

Về vị trí bãi biển, khách sạn nằm gần khu vực công viên Đồi Dương nên lối xuống biển và đặc điểm bãi cát có thể khác với một số bãi tắm du lịch khác tại Phan Thiết. Tuy nhiên, đây cũng là khu vực thuận tiện để di chuyển tham quan, khám phá ẩm thực địa phương như Quý Khách đã chia sẻ.

Một lần nữa, chúng

reviews.title: Doi Duong Beach, the waves crash furiously!
reviews.text: The hotel is quite nice, with a spacious area facing the beautiful Doi Duong beach. The breakfast buffet is full, there is a pool and a gym, on the right there is a Highland coffee, and on the left there is a classical Pey coffee. There is a pickleball court for rent for over 80k. The Doi Duong beach is quite beautiful; however, the waves are strong, making it very difficult to swim. If you are not careful, you might get knocked down by the waves, which can lead to injury. Overall, this is my impression on my first trip to Phan Thiet.

reviews.title: Not completely satisfied.
reviews.text:
The reception was welcoming, the hotel was clean, the air conditioning ran quietly, breakfast was relatively diverse, and the location was beautiful right next to Doi Duong beach, the pool was decent. 
Downside: no welcome drink, bathrobes and razors were not available (they had to be requested from reception), luggage bags were also not readily available, when requested they provided a plastic bag without handles => not luxurious and does not reflect the brand well. 
(You can check more reviews on Google Maps, I will send a video later.)
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Mr Học,
Cám ơn quý Khách đã dành thời gian để đánh giá về các dịch vụ và chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình tại TTC Hotel Phan Thiết
Chúng tôi ghi nhận sự hài lòng của quý Khách đối với chất lượng phục vụ của nhân viên lễ tân, cũng như vị trí đia lý của khách sạn. Tuy nhiên, chúng tôi cũng rất xin lỗi về nước welcome drink, những vật dụng trong phòng, túi đựng đồ không làm quý khách hài lòng. Sự việc đã ngay lập tức trao đổi với các bộ phận liên quan để xử lý và có những biện pháp khắc phục tránh lặp lại trong tương lai. Hi vọng chúng tôi sẽ được chào đón quý Khách quay trở lại vào thời gian tới để Khách sạn có cơ hội để phục vụ quý Khách tốt hơn.
Trân Trọng Cám Ơn
Giám Đốc
Nguyễn Thị Cẩm Tú.

reviews.title: Everything was fine except the breakfast's bread
reviews.text:
Nice hotel to stay if you are Vietnamese and speaking Vietnamese. The room is huge and clean. Price is very reasonable. But keep in mind that it is not a luxury hotel. The beach is separated from the hotel by a road. There is a pedestrian pass but no-one, absolutely no anyone is going to stop their vehicles so that you can cross the road. 
The beach is dirty and full of little stones.
The worse of the whole hotel was the breakfast' bread. The staff would ask you for the opinion of the hotel, when you said that everything is fine but the bread, they would answer you that it was made in the hotel kitchen, with all the alimentary control, etc... But the truth is it was the worse bread in the whole Vietnam.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. / Mrs,
Thank you for choosing TTC Hotel Phan Thiet for your stay.
Doi Duong beach has rocks since ancient times, the sea water is cloudy due to plankton and we cannot change it. Also, we apologize for the breakfast (bread) caused. The incident was immediately discussed with the chef to handle and take remedial measures to avoid repetition in the future. I appreciate your feedback.
Looking forward to welcoming you again soon.
Thanks & Regards,
General Manager
Nguyen Manh Cuong

reviews.text:
Can I point out first of al that the "review" by the "honeymoon couple" below is one of the most blatantly fake reviews I have ever seen.  This kind of thing is ruining the concept of online reviewing.  However, this is the only bad thing i can say about the hotel.

I stayed at the park Diamond for just one night before heading to meet friends in nearby Mui Ne. I was actually very ill with food poisoning and couldn't have found a better place to recover!  Very comfortable rooms, everything working fine including hot water.  lovely views.  I arrived right at the end of breakfast so can't really comment, but it looked fine.

reviews.title: Lovely staff but never booking with Booking.com again
reviews.positives: Staff were lovely, nice pool.
reviews.negatives: There was an issue with our booking. I had booked a room for 2 adults and 2 kids as per the confirmation and the Child policy of the hotel states that if you put the number of kids and their ages into the booking their occupancy is included. When we got to the hotel there was just a large bed. The staff at reception were unable to help other than say we’d have to pay an addition $1.5M VND to get one extra single bed for a child (we have 2 kids). This cost was not stated anywhere at the time of booking or in the confirmation. The staff were lovely but unable to help and then I called Booking.com customer service which hung up on me twice after repeating over and over that I booked a double room even though my confirmation clearly stated 2 kids were included including a picture of 2 adults and 2 kids. After persisting with the staff that I do not want my kids to sleep on the floor and we didn’t want to spend an additional $1.5M VND for just 1 child the staff allowed us to speak to the manager who said the kids only get breakfast and not a bed which makes no sense. Finally they agreed to give us one single bed for free meaning 3 of us slept in the big bed which was rather uncomfortable but better than sleeping on the floor. The manager apologised to me the next morning which was appreciated. Unfortunately it ruined our first night as it took 4 hours to sort out the issue and I had to cut my dinner short to deal with it. My issue is not so much with the hotel but Booking.com who clearly have an issue with their booking system which doesn’t recognise when the room does not meet the requirements entered and had incorrect information such as the ability to have 2 kids in the booking when the room doesn’t allow it. Nor does it tell you anything about extra costs. What parents would go to a hotel and then send their kids off somewhere else to sleep and ask them to come meet for breakfast? We didn’t book breakfast, we booked a hotel room and the main requirement is a bed.

reviews.title: Worth the stay and value
reviews.text:
This is our 3rd time staying at Ttc (2 times ago was Park Diamond)

Our first visit , We were greeted by Mr. Liem at the reception. He was very accommodating to my family of 10, setting us 5 rooms on the same floor. Check-in was fast considering our party size. 
We appreciate Mr. Liem's kindness and professionalism.  

The standard room is showing signs of wear and tear. The carpet is stained and aged. Some wall paper starting to peel from wall. 
Room size is super large. Love the dresser, closet and storage space. Furniture is modern dark wood. 
Bathroom has granite counters, bathtub and nice separate standup glass shower. 
Air con works wonderful. 
Elevation plays classical music. 
Lobby lounge bar has great vibes, great music lovely lemongrass aromatherapy. Love it. 
Hallways are dark at night and has no air conditioner 
Exercise room on 3rd floor. Out of service and Under construction. No air con. fully equipped. 

Breakfast
Breakfast items has a variety but limited. 
Meaning one dry noodle, one rice, one porridge, one curry or ragu, very few side items. 
It has omelette station, and one hot noodle soup station. 
Clean And fast service. 
Since Vietnam is the Worlds 2nd largest coffee exporter (behind Brazil)
A Vietnamese Hotel should serve Vietnamese coffee in their breakfast room. 
Not here. Ttc breakfast serves American coffee which America is not popular for.
I told the server my coffee isn't great. 
She then brings me a cup of vietnamese coffee and a bill for $25000.  
For a 4star hotel, that was unexpected.

Small beach. 
No real coffee, only choice was sweet half cold coffee from a machine. 
Little fruit on the breakfast buffet.
